name: Cloudflare
description: Cloudflare Pages deployment with verification, rollback, and diff review

commands.cf:login: Authenticate with Cloudflare via wrangler OAuth login
commands.cf:init: Setup wizard — connect to Cloudflare, configure project, generate .cfignore
commands.cf:prepare: Prepare static output for deployment (404 handling, localhost URL replacement)
commands.cf:deploy: Prepare, verify, diff against live, and deploy to Cloudflare Pages
commands.cf:verify: Verify static output is complete and ready to deploy
commands.cf:status: Compare local static files against live Cloudflare deployment
commands.cf:cache-purge: Purge the Cloudflare CDN cache for specific URLs or the entire zone
commands.cf:purge: Delete old deployments to clean up stale files from the project pool
commands.cf:rollback: Rollback to a previous Cloudflare Pages deployment
commands.cf:rollback:list: List Cloudflare Pages deployments available for rollback
